summary: Tested PWA 'Add to Home Screen' feature and Discord webhook management in admin panel. All features working correctly.

issues: Console warning: DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for accessibility (minor, cosmetic)

critical_code_review_comments: Add to Home Screen button correctly uses lg:hidden class to show only on mobile
Install instructions modal provides clear step-by-step instructions for both Android and iOS
Discord webhook section properly validates URLs before adding
Status badges dynamically show 'Active' count or 'Not Configured'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Add to Home Screen PWA feature and Discord webhooks in product edit have been tested and verified working. All UI elements have proper data-testid attributes.

add_to_home_screen_button_desktop.details: Button correctly hidden on desktop viewport (lg:hidden class working)

add_to_home_screen_button_mobile.details: Button visible on mobile viewport (390x844) when sidebar is open

install_instructions_modal.details: Modal opens with Android Chrome and iOS Safari instructions, 'Got it!' button closes modal

discord_webhook_section_visibility.details: Discord Webhooks section visible in product edit dialog with purple Discord-branded styling

discord_webhook_status_indicator.details: Shows 'Not Configured' (grey) or 'X Active' (green with checkmark) based on webhook count

discord_webhook_validation.details: Invalid URLs show error toast 'Please enter a valid Discord webhook URL'

discord_webhook_add_remove.details: Can add valid webhook URLs, they appear in list with remove (X) button

discord_webhook_test_button.details: Test button appears for each added webhook to send test notification
